name: Manga18
notes: Reference source of the family (manga18.club software). Zero overrides — pure config on stock defaults.

name: 18PornComic
notes: Overrides only the selectTag protected-open-val selector — pure config via selectors.selectTag.

name: Tumanhwas
notes: Spanish. Overrides only selectTag + selectAlt selectors — pure config. locale defaults from lang=es for date parsing.

name: Comic1000
notes: @Broken upstream (site dead). No overrides — pure-config row on stock defaults. nsfw=false (no ContentType.HENTAI on the @MangaSourceParser).

name: Hentai3z.cc
notes: Overrides parseMangaList (a real parsing method) to rewrite cover URLs — datafied via coverReplacements, so behaviour is fully reproduced; flagged for the method override per task definition.

name: Hanman18
notes: Chinese. Overrides getChapters (a real parsing method — chapters carry no date, uploadDate=0) and getFilterOptions (empty tags). Datafied via chaptersHaveDate=false + disableTags=true; flagged for the getChapters override.
